actionUnits.condition: Call Toggle() on MonoBehaviour id=1963046888 (m_Script guid=064216bc04beaca4fab9a6b5d9bca977) which corresponds to script ToggleVisibility. This GameObject has RectTransform and typical Canvas components; no Renderer is listed. Awake() will run automatically on scene load and cache GetComponent<Renderer>(), likely null. Invoking Toggle() will attempt to read currentRenderer.enabled and may throw NullReferenceException if no Renderer is present. This test is to cover Awake() and Toggle() paths and surface the null handling issue.
